_comment: IMAP email config. Copy and fill in your credentials.
_email_note_1: Regular passwords do NOT work — you need an App Password.
_email_note_4: 3) Create a new app password (name it anything, e.g. 'stoai')
_email_note_5: 4) Copy the 16-char password (format: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx)
_email_note_7: 2) Go to Security → App passwords → Create a new app password
